title: selliguea lima
intro: Selliguea lima, also known as the Polypodioid fern or Selaginella, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and is also used to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Selliguea lima can be prepared as tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
